title: Standards established by department of public safety
doc_html:
§798.  Standards established by department of public safety

On or before January 1, 1975, the department of public safety shall establish technical and operational standards for the development of basic and sophisticated systems.

Added by Acts 1974, No. 94, §1.
doc_text:
§798.  Standards established by department of public safety
On or before January 1, 1975, the department of public safety shall establish technical and operational standards for the development of basic and sophisticated systems.
Added by Acts 1974, No. 94, §1.
